title: UAE spooked? Abu Dhabi joins Saudi-Qatar push to stop Trump’s Iran war
content: Gulf allies UAE, Saudi Arabia, and Qatar urged President Trump to pursue diplomacy with Iran, fearing renewed conflict would destabilize regional economies.  Leaders argued military action wouldn't achieve US objectives, reflecting a shift for the UAE after recent hostilities.  All three nations remain wary of further escalation.

title: Google co-founder Sergey Brin donates $500,000 to group fighting ‘overpaid CEO tax’
content: Google co-founder Sergey Brin is injecting significant funds into San Francisco's local politics, backing a business-friendly tax proposal while opposing a controversial "Overpaid CEO Tax."  This move, following his relocation from Silicon Valley, reflects Brin's broader campaign against wealth redistribution measures, which he links to his personal experience fleeing socialism.

title: SRH script history, rewrite record books with brutal assault on RCB
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad continued their explosive IPL 2026 run, smashing 255 for 4 against Royal Challengers Bengaluru. This marked their ninth 200-plus total this season, a new record.  Powered by Abhishek Sharma, Ishan Kishan, and Heinrich Klaasen's blistering knocks, SRH solidified their status as IPL's most destructive batting unit, owning six 250-plus scores in history.

title: Two wars, one arsenal: Ukraine or Israel — who gets America's missiles when supplies run short?
content: Defence analysts warn the issue is not just the quantity of weapons today but the speed at which industry can regenerate what has been used. A single week of heavy combat in either theatre can consume months of production output for certain precision munitions and interceptors. This has transformed a temporary logistical challenge into a broader strategic concern.

title: Mark Zuckerberg's email to employees has a 'goodbye note' for those laid off
content: Meta has initiated significant layoffs, sending emails to thousands of employees whose positions are being eliminated.  Company leadership confirmed the decision to reduce headcount for increased efficiency.  Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg also sent a company-wide memo expressing gratitude to departing employees and outlining future company direction.  He assured remaining staff that no further company-wide layoffs are expected this year.

title: Jeff Marek: Oilers consider aggressive Pavel Dorofeyev trade vs Golden Knights
content: The Edmonton Oilers are being floated as a possibility to make bold NHL offseason rumours after insider Jeff Marek floated the idea of a possible Pavel Dorofeyev offer sheet scenario. Edmonton could turn to the Vegas Golden Knights winger to add to its scoring depth after a disappointing playoff exit. Vegas’ salary-cap concerns and Dorofeyev’s breakout performances have fuelled speculation over one of the NHL’s most aggressive possible offseason moves.

title: Aishwarya Rai’s first Cannes 2026 look stuns in sapphire-blue gown
content: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan, who has been away from the silver screen for quite some time, was spotted jetting off to the ongoing edition of the Cannes Film Festival in the early hours of Friday. The actress received a warm welcome upon arriving at Hotel Martinez in Cannes. Now, Aishwarya is all set to dominate the red carpet yet again, and the first visuals of her appearance have already sent social media into a frenzy.

title: Virat Kohli scripts all-time T20 record, leaves Babar Azam and Gayle behind
content: Virat Kohli has etched his name in T20 cricket history, now holding the record for the most 50-plus partnerships. This latest milestone was achieved during the IPL 2026 match against Sunrisers Hyderabad, where he and Venkatesh Iyer forged another significant opening stand.  Kohli's remarkable consistency continues to set new benchmarks in the sport.

title: 'I have fired hundreds of employees': ClickUp CEO Zeb Evans says in memo
content: ClickUp CEO Zeb Evans announced a 22% workforce reduction, framing it as a proactive restructuring for a "100x org" driven by AI. The company is introducing $1 million salary bands for employees who significantly impact AI systems, emphasizing a shift towards rewarding outsized contributions rather than cost-cutting.

title: India's tryst with oil shocks: Why one commodity kept reshaping policy
content: India's economy has faced significant challenges from global oil price surges over the past fifty years. From the 1973 Arab embargo to the recent Hormuz disruption, these shocks have impacted inflation and foreign exchange reserves. Policymakers have continuously adapted strategies to manage these crises, balancing economic stability with consumer needs.

title: ‘Your 3D cricketer’: India’s 2019 World Cup squad member announces retirement
content: All-rounder Vijay Shankar has announced his retirement from all Indian domestic cricket and the IPL, concluding a career that saw him represent India in ODIs and T20Is, including the 2019 World Cup. Shankar, who played 12 ODIs and 9 T20Is, expressed gratitude for his journey and plans to explore new opportunities in cricket.

title: Taylor Swift pregnancy rumors go viral after cryptic post and ultrasound claims
content: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are reportedly planning a wedding in June 2026. However, the couple faces constant pregnancy rumors. A parody account recently shared a fake ultrasound sonogram image. It adds fuel to speculation fire. This is not the first time Swift has been targeted with such rumors. Her team is working to protect her image from AI misuse, but protection is limited globally. It only protects her in the US.

title: Wayne Gretzky reacts humorously to McDavid Oilers future trade speculation
content: Connor McDavid's future with the Edmonton Oilers is making big NHL headlines after another disappointing playoff exit. During a recent media appearance, Gretzky addressed the mounting speculation, joking that he doesn’t want Edmonton fans to damage his statue if he told McDavid to leave. The talk also turned to current NHL trade rumours, playoff frustrations and questions about Edmonton’s long-term championship hopes.

title: Crosby discusses NHL retirement timeline and Penguins contract future
content: Sidney Crosby has responded to speculation he could retire ahead of another season with the Pittsburgh Penguins. The veteran NHL captain said he still plans to play beyond 2027, though discussions about his future are ongoing. Crosby also said his year-to-year contract approach is in place to help the Pittsburgh Penguins maintain roster flexibility during the franchise’s ongoing transition period.

title: 'If both parents are IAS officers, why reservation?' SC on quota for creamy layer
content: The Supreme Court questioned extending reservation benefits to affluent individuals within backward classes, emphasizing social mobility through empowerment. Justices noted that children of well-placed government employees should ideally exit the reservation system.

title: The game of numbers: When governor holds the key to people's verdict
content: In India's democracy, fractured election mandates often shift power to governors, who become arbiters of government formation. The recent Tamil Nadu election saw actor-turned-politician Vijay's party emerge as the single largest, but the governor's discretion in inviting him to form the government sparked debate over constitutional conventions and political arithmetic.

title: RBI's record dividend payout of Rs 2.87L cr: How will it help govt amid Middle East crisis?
content: Experts believe that the RBI’s record surplus transfer will offer only partial support to the government’s strained fiscal position amid the continuing crisis in West Asia.

title: Only Warner ahead! Ishan Kishan achieves rare milestone vs RCB
content: Ishan Kishan continued his dominance against Royal Challengers Bengaluru with a 79, marking his fourth consecutive 50-plus score against them. Sunrisers Hyderabad's batting prowess was further evident with fifties from Abhishek Sharma and Heinrich Klaasen, leading to a massive total and a record-breaking season for 200+ scores.

title: 'Warning shot': Attack on UAE's n-plant was Iran's message to Gulf if peace talks fail
content: A drone attack on the UAE's Barakah nuclear plant, originating from Iraq, has heightened regional escalation fears. Analysts believe Iran-backed militias are a key front in Tehran's confrontation with the US and Israel. The strike, condemned as a terrorist act, forced backup systems at the plant to activate, highlighting the vulnerability of critical infrastructure amid rising tensions.

title: Historic IPL feat for SRH! Abhishek, Klaasen, Ishan become only ...
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad's Abhishek Sharma, Heinrich Klaasen, and Ishan Kishan have etched their names in IPL history, becoming the second trio to score over 500 runs each in a season. This remarkable batting feat fuels SRH's strong IPL 2026 campaign as they aim for a top-two finish.

title: Why people are investing in real estate in Karnal: Expert insights
content: Tier-2 cities are driving India's real estate boom, with Karnal emerging as a prime North Indian destination. Its strategic location, robust industrial base, and planned infrastructure, including upcoming RRTS connectivity, offer premium living without the congestion of metros. This makes Karnal an attractive hub for both residents and investors seeking luxury and convenience.

title: 'If I was Agarkar, I would switch off my phone': Ashwin on Shubman Gill's T20I selection
content: Ravichandran Ashwin highlights the intense competition for India's T20I squad, praising Shubman Gill's IPL form but acknowledging emerging talents like Vaibhav Suryavanshi and Priyansh Arya. He notes the difficulty selectors face with a deep talent pool, including established players like Sanju Samson and Abhishek Sharma, making selection a significant challenge.

title: 'Big mistake': WHO warns against underestimating Ebola spread risk
content: WHO's Africa director warns against underestimating the Ebola outbreak in DRC and Uganda, stressing that even one case could spread widely due to the lack of a vaccine for this strain. He urged for greater international attention, highlighting the potential risk to all from a single infected individual. Efforts are underway to boost testing and community engagement amidst challenges.

title: Parents’ emotional reaction to son’s Google job offer goes viral
content: A heartwarming home video of Harnav Singh sharing his Google job offer with his parents has captivated social media. Their genuine, emotional reactions, from his mother's proud embrace to his father's affectionate gesture, resonated deeply with viewers, highlighting the universal joy of parental pride and a child's success. This simple family moment became a viral sensation.

title: Surgeon removes wrong kidney: NCDRC awards Rs 2 crore compensation to family
content: A surgeon was found grossly negligent by the NCDRC for removing a patient's healthy kidney instead of the diseased one, leading to her death. The commission awarded ₹2 crore compensation to the family, calling the error a "medical disaster." The surgeon's defense was rejected, and institutional findings supported the negligence claim.

title: Viral moment! Virat Kohli erupts after Travis Head’s stumps are shattered
content: Rasikh Salam Dar's fiery yorker dismantled Travis Head's stumps, igniting a passionate celebration from the young pacer and a pumped-up Virat Kohli. Head's aggressive 26 off 16 balls ended abruptly, giving RCB a crucial breakthrough. Defending champions RCB, already playoff-bound in IPL 2026, faced Sunrisers Hyderabad in a key clash.

title: Sooryavanshi's Bihar to have IPL team? CM says govt working in 'mission mode'
content: Only four years ago, two new teams — Gujarat Titans and Lucknow Super Giants — were added to the league.

title: Students enraged over CBSE’s Class 12 evaluation, say OSM turned checking into a ‘lottery’
content: CBSE’s On-Screen Marking (OSM) system has come under scrutiny after Class 12 results triggered complaints of blurred scans, alleged evaluation errors and unexpected marks. While the Ministry of Education has defended the digital process as secure and efficient, students claim it has affected fairness and transparency, leading to distress and demands for clearer evaluation and rechecking mechanisms.

title: Carolina Hurricanes’ William Carrier faces awkward Canadiens rivalry at home
content: Carolina Hurricanes forward William Carrier says his wife and family are cheering for the Montreal Canadiens in the NHL playoffs. The surprise family feud has been one of the more fun stories coming out of the Eastern Conference Final. But Carrier remains 100 percent focused on helping Carolina keep its impressive postseason run going, despite the awkward playoff loyalties inside his house.

title: India tests Vayu Astra loitering munition, which can hit targets 100km inside enemy territory
content: Nibe Limited, a leading innovator in defense technology from India, has successfully tested its Vayu Astra Loitering Munition, which features a robust 10 kg warhead and a striking operational range of 100 km. This next-gen drone sets itself apart with its operator-controlled functionality, empowering users to identify and engage targets dynamically.

title: IPL 2026: Captain Rajat Patidar back for RCB; SRH opt to bat in Hyderabad
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad captain Pat Cummins won the toss and chose to bat against Royal Challengers Bengaluru in their IPL 2026 playoff clash. Both teams have already secured their playoff berths. Cummins expressed a desire to test strategies and enjoy the game before the serious business of the finals begins. Rajat Patidar returns to captain RCB.

title: 'Amount is an insult': Pakistan hockey players hit out over PKR 1000 daily allowance
content: The PHF’s interim management announced that players and officials of the national team will receive a daily allowance of USD 110 during foreign tours.

title: Karnataka govt. extends viability gap funding of ₹28.47 crore to resume flights from Bengaluru to Bidar, Kalaburagi
content: The government is committed to enhancing air connectivity to Tier-2 and Tier-3 cities across the State. Such initiatives would not only accelerate regional economic growth but also contribute to infrastructure development: M.B. Patil

title: Piyush Goyal meets officials, industry representatives to discuss ways to boost manufacturing
content: The exercise is aimed at reducing the import bill of the country, as outflows of foreign exchange are impacting the value of the domestic currency against the U.S. dollar

title: Modi expresses support for the sovereignty and territorial integrity of Cyprus
content: Cyprus calls for energising IMEEC that will connect India with EU; expresses interest in buying items from the Indian defence industry

title: Supreme Court orders immediate FIRs in missing person cases, activation of anti-trafficking units within 4 weeks
content: Police stations were directed to immediately register FIRs, incorporating offences under the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023, relating to kidnapping and trafficking, the moment information regarding a missing person is received

title: Twisha Sharma death case: husband taken into custody, M.P. HC allows second autopsy
content: Earlier, Samarth Singh reached the Jabalpur district court on the evening of May 22, to surrender, his lawyer said; the anticipatory bail application was filed before the high court on May 21, 2026, after a subordinate court turned down his plea last week

title: India successfully test-fires Agni-1 ballistic missile from Odisha
content: Earlier, on May 8, the country had successfully carried out a flight trial of an advanced Agni missile with Multiple Independently Targetable Re-Entry Vehicle off the coast of the State

title: Centre tells Supreme Court it will bring back persons allegedly ‘pushed’ to Bangladesh
content: Senior advocates Kapil Sibal and Sanjay Hegde, appearing for Ms. Khatun’s father Bhodu Sekh, had been repeatedly seeking a hearing in court. Mr. Mehta’s submission came as a relief to the petitioner’s side

title: Reconstituted PAC meets; BJP objects to panel taking up issues suo motu
content: The panel expressed concern over pending Action Taken Notes and a heavy backlog in the Audit Para Monitoring System, which tracks Ministries’ follow-up on audit observations related to irregularities, procedural violations, financial lapses, and inefficient use of public funds

title: Jharkhand High Court seeks report on alleged sexual assault of woman inmate in Ranchi jail
content: Leader of Opposition in the Jharkhand Assembly, Babulal Marandi, had written a letter to Chief Minister Hemant Soren raising the issue of alleged sexual exploitation by Jail Superintendent resulting in pregnancy

title: Muslim cleric wants West Bengal formula of skipping slaughter of cattle for Bakrid
content: We do not believe that revenue to madrassas or other religious institutions on account of animal hide donation and sale will be a problem. The hide market already collapsed a few years ago, Maulana Husamuddin Sani Jafar Pasha said

title: Karnataka notifies final draft of minimum wages with average increase of 60%
content: The final draft of minimum wages ranges from ₹19,300 for an unskilled worker in Zone 3 to ₹31,100 for the highly skilled worker in Zone 1. The average increase of minimum wages is about 60 % from the current wages.

title: Samyukt Kisan Morcha warns against natural farming, asks Centre to ensure adequate fertilisers
content: The SKM leaders asked farmer unions, peasant organisations and agricultural workers to burn copies of the recent Government order on MSP for the kharif crops in every village

title: VCK runs into severe criticism from DMK leaders for  joining TVK-led government
content: As matters threatened to turn ugly, DMK president M.K. Stalin intervened and appealed to the party leaders to calm down, arguing that every party can determine its own political course

title: APSRTC unions oppose privatisation of electric bus operations
content: They seek recruitment drive, new buses and stronger welfare measures for employees during Joint Staff Council meeting at the State Secretariat

title: Watch: Is the TVK’s cabinet expansion DMK’s loss? | Above the Fold | 22.05.2026
content: In today’s episode: TVK inducts VCK and IUML leaders into its Cabinet, raising questions about the DMK’s strength; the Delhi High Court questions the WFI over Vinesh Phogat’s eligibility and more.

title: Allahabad HC pulls up Uttar Pradesh police over concealment of arms licence details of influential persons
content: Data placed before the court showed that Uttar Pradesh has over 10 lakh arms licences, and out of these, 6,062 licences were issued to persons facing two or more criminal cases

title: After buses, BMTC plans to turn passenger tickets into advertising space
content: BMTC has invited bids from advertising agencies for granting licence rights to print advertisements on Electronic Ticketing Machine thermal rolls issued to passengers across Bengaluru

title: Telangana’s NIMS doctors perform a record 2,000 kidney transplants, 95% free of cost
content: With the milestone, NIMS emerged as one of the country’s highest-volume renal transplant centres in government sector

title: Behind the viral ‘Dhurandhar’ veena hook: Meet Carnatic musician Ramana Balachandran
content: Loved Dhurandhar’s ‘Phir Se’ track? This 24-year-old classical vainika is in the spotlight for his part in the song

title: No permission for human chain protest called by Cockroach Janta Party: Bengaluru police
content: The poster circulating online carried the tagline: “Not just online, it’s time to show power in the streets”

title: Delhi HC slams WFI for denying Vinesh Phogat a chance to participate in the Asian Games trials
content: WFI revised selection criteria to exclude wrestlers without 2025 or 2026 medals, termed Ms. Phogat’s 2024 Olympics disqualification a “national shame”, provoking the court’s ire; Ms. Phogat has not competed since December 2024, and had a baby in July 2025

title: Telangana Cabinet meet on May 23 to draw up checklist and plans for future
content: The meeting today is likely to reflect upon concerns over the evolving West Asia crisis and its possible impact on Telangana’s economy and revenue generation

title: CSIR‑IICT technology powers India’s compressed biogas scale-up
content: From rotting market waste to farm residue, India’s twin waste crisis is finding a sustainable solution in compressed biogas. Backed by CSIR-IICT innovations, the technology transforms organic waste into clean fuel, boosting farmer incomes, reducing pollution, and advancing the country’s circular economy goals

title: Supreme Court refers UAPA bail curbs to larger Bench for ‘authoritative’ ruling
content: Amid “perceived conflict” among Benches, top court refuses to examine “correctness of observations” made in a recent ruling; it grants interim bail to two Delhi riots accused; Additional Solicitor General says courts must strike balance between “interests of society” and “rights of accused”

title: Summer heat pushes power demand to an all-time high on May 21 in Andhra Pradesh
content: Demand has surged across domestic, industrial, commercial and agricultural sectors, officials say, adding that advance planning and continuous monitoring have helped maintain grid stability and ensure uninterrupted supply during peak hours

title: Political activity set to pick up in Karnataka with notification of elections to four Rajya Sabha seats
content: The elections have been necessitated by completion of the term of former Prime Minister H.D. Deve Gowda and Leader of Opposition in Rajya Sabha Mallikarjuna Kharge

title: Over 2.3 lakh students register for TNEA 2026
content: Counselling likely to begin in second week of July, starting with sessions for special category students, say officials

title: Are cartoons in NCERT textbooks proper? Supreme Court asks retired judge panel to review
content: The order came after Solicitor General Tushar Mehta raised the issue and said 'textbook is not a place where you use cartoons'

title: Plus One admissions likely from May 25
content: At present, 3,60,844 higher secondary seats, 33,000 vocational higher secondary seats, and over 30,000 seats in polytechnic and ITIs are available in the State

title: Election Commission announces Rajya Sabha polls for 24 seats on June 18
content: The last date for filing nominations is June 8 and counting will take place after polling on the same day

title: Quad, Oil, Defence: Why Marco Rubio's India Visit Carries High Stakes
content: India continues to purchase large volumes of discounted Russian oil, but the US is looking to expand its footprint in India's energy market through LNG and crude exports.

title: The Hidden Climate Shift Making India's Heatwaves More Deadly
content: In cities and small towns alike, thermometers are hovering stubbornly near 30 degrees Celsius long after sunset.

title: TVK Minister To NDTV On Why Vijay Sarkar Will Defy Opposition's Bad Wishes
content: "We may be inexperienced in governance, but we are very, very experienced in our principles," Tamil Nadu's new Health Minister KG Arunraj told NDTV

title: Trump's Team Wanted To Ban Voting Machines In Half Of US Last Year: Report
content: White House adviser Kurt Olsen, a lawyer Trump has tasked with proving widely debunked election-rigging conspiracy theories, pushed the plan to target Dominion Voting Systems machines.

title: Supreme Court Refers Umar Khalid, Sharjeel Imam Bail Question To Larger Bench
content: A bench comprising Justice Aravind Kumar and Justice Prasanna B Varale, which denied bail to Umar Khalid in January, observed that a bench of similar strength could not have expressed exception to the order.

title: The Right To Cool: In A City Of 2.3 Crore, Delhi Has Just 1 Cooling Zone
content: Under the Delhi government's Heat Wave Action Plan 2026, officials had promised a network of cooling zones across the capital.

title: 'If Parents Are IAS Officers, Why Reservation For Their Children?': Supreme Court
content: Before the case reached the Supreme Court, the authorities noted that both parents were government employees and that their combined income exceeded the prescribed creamy layer threshold

title: Live Updates: Bar Council Suspends Samarth Singh From Legal Practice
content: Twisha Sharma Death Updates: The case came under scrutiny as the Madhya Pradesh Police faced criticism for an inefficient probe into the case, while Giribala Singh was accused of exerting undue influence.

title: 2 Children Among 6 Killed As Bus Rams Autorickshaw In Odisha's Ganjam
content: All of them were residents of Erenda village under the Chikiti block and were travelling in the autorickshaw when the accident occurred.

title: India, Cyprus Elevate Ties To Strategic Partnership, Sign 6 Deals
content: The talks between the two leaders primarily focused on boosting ties in trade and investment, critical technologies, education, and implementation of the ambitious India-Middle East-Europe Economic Corridor.

title: EU To Impose Sanctions On Iranian Officials For Hormuz Strait Blockade
content: Deeming the blockade "contrary to international law", EU governments took a technical step to extend the scope of its existing Iran sanctions regime allowing for more individuals to be targeted under it.

title: Italy, France, UK, Germany Urge Israel To End West Bank Settlement Expansion
content: Noting that the situation in the West Bank had "deteriorated significantly" in the past few months, the countries said settler violence towards Palestinians was at "unprecedented levels".

title: Ladakh Police Chief Mukesh Singh Appointed Manipur Top Cop
content: An IIT Delhi graduate in Civil Engineering, Singh has extensive experience in counter-insurgency and anti-terror operations.

title: PM Modi To Virtually Distribute Over 51,000 Job Letters At 19th Rozgar Mela
content: Since its inception, around 12 lakh recruitment letters have been issued through 18 Rozgar Melas organised across the country, it said.

title: Man, 2 Sons Killed As SUV Hits Car Head-On In UP's Yamuna Nagar
content: An SUV approaching the city from the direction of Rewa apparently went out of control and collided head on with a car travelling in the opposite direction.

title: Centre Tells Top Court Bringing 4 Bangladesh Deportees Back. Then Adds Caveat
content: Recording the Centre's submission, the Chief Justice said the four individuals will be brought back within 10 days, and their citizenship status would then be verified.
